flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Tacoma Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.2k vs 5.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tacoma Community College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (37.3% → 31.5%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tacoma Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $11.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tacoma Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.5k).
